case_title: DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP. VS. RONALD I ESCOBAR MATUTE

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) /AUTH TO APPEAR FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELAWARE PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE, PER PLAINTIFF. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY CLAUDIA BARDALES-LEGAL SERVICES SUPERVISOR.
